seo_content:
Top One Futures Technical Infrastructure

Top One Futures, based in the United States and established in April 2025, is a futures proprietary trading firm offering Instant Sim Funded (instant), S2F Sim Pro (instant), Ignite (instant), and Elite (1-step) programs. Account sizes range from $25,000 to $150,000. Three platforms are supported: Tradovate, TradingView, and NinjaTrader. No coupon code is currently published; discounts are reflected directly in listed prices.

The Instant Sim Funded program is available at $25,000 for $167.60 (original $419.00) and $150,000 for $375.60 (original $939.00). The S2F Sim Pro program spans four sizes: $25,000 at $102.80 (original $257.00), $50,000 at $168.40 (original $421.00), $100,000 at $252.80 (original $632.00), and $150,000 at $290.80 (original $727.00). The Ignite program is offered at $25,000 for $87.20 (original $218.00) and $50,000 for $159.20 (original $398.00). The Elite 1-step program is listed at $25,000 for $27.60 (original $69.00) and $100,000 for $83.60 (original $209.00). Payments are accepted via Apple Pay, Credit/Debit Card, and Crypto.

Three platforms are supported: Tradovate, TradingView, and NinjaTrader. All instruments are futures-based; no specific leverage data is published. News trading is permitted across all programs with no stated restrictions. All positions must be closed by 4:10 PM EST; overnight and weekend holding is not permitted, and open positions at market close are subject to auto-liquidation. The inactivity threshold is 14 calendar days on funded accounts; there is no timer during the Elite challenge phase.

The profit split is 90/10 across all programs. Elite requires traders to pass through profit targets of 6%, 5%, and 4% in successive tiers. S2F accounts require 10 trading days with at least 7 profitable days before the first payout. Ignite requires a 5% profit target with no minimum trading day requirement. Maximum payout per withdrawal ranges from $1,500 to $3,500 depending on account size. Payouts are on-demand once requirements are met. Payout methods are Crypto and Riseworks.

Top One Futures enforces a 10-second rule: trades must remain open for more than 10 seconds. If more than 50% of trades violate this rule, profit removal is applied. EAs and automated bots are not permitted; trading must be manual and skill-based. Copy trading is allowed only between accounts of the same type and size — the maximum account limits are 3 Elite or Instant accounts, 5 S2F Sim PRO accounts, and 6 IGNITE accounts per trader.
